messages.content: What's driving this refactoring, and how will we know when it's complete?

The current code directly calls Ecto everywhere. I want to introduce a Repository pattern to decouple the business logic from the database. It's done when all business logic modules use the Repository instead of Ecto.Repo directly.
That makes sense. Are there any constraints on the approach - like whether to keep the existing schemas, or any modules that should be excluded from this change?
Keep existing schemas unchanged. Don't touch the admin panel - it can keep using Ecto.Repo directly for now.
